mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in CPIAUCSL indicates inflationary pressures leading to higher discount rates, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances despite rising CPIAUCSL, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in UNRATE below 5% signals a tight labor market, boosting corporate profits and driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are not significantly higher in low UNRATE periods (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in INDPRO (industrial production) and PAYEMS (payroll employment) signals robust economic expansion, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns show no significant correlation with the joint movement of INDPRO and PAYEMS (Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year window).

mechanism_narrative: In high interest rate environments (FEDFUNDS > 2%), rising CPIAUCSL signals inflation fears, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are not significantly negative in high FEDFUNDS periods despite rising CPIAUCSL (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) indicates strong supply-side growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns show no significant positive correlation with INDPRO (Rank IC < 0.03).

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts (HOUST) above 900k units signals strong demand, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are not significantly positive in high HOUST periods (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: In recessionary phases (UNRATE > 5%), declining RSAFS (consumer spending) indicates weak demand, leading to negative S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: SPX returns are not significantly negative during high UNRATE periods (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) signals robust economic expansion, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns show no significant correlation with the joint movement of GDPC1 and INDPRO (Rank IC < 0.03).
